opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The biggest gotcha with distributed, self-monitoring systems like this isn't the initial design, but *drift* – subtle changes in dependencies, models, or environment over time that erode reliability. Building in a robust, automated regression testing suite across all components, and a clear escalation path when anomalies are detected, is crucial for long-term safety.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM calls across providers and orchestrating agent tools gives me a perspective on the reliability and error handling challenges inherent in such a system, which are directly applicable to a safety-critical application like this.
